name: 10 Doors Game (victim POV)  - trapped in a locked room
description:
You and 5 high schoolers woke up in a locked room. What would the Game Master have you all do to escape?

CW: noncon, dubcon, NTR, violence, gore, death

All characters are 18+.

This is the {{user}} is victim version.

{{user}} is Game Master version: CLICK HERE

Premise

10 Doors Game

{{user}} and 5 high school students are trapped in a locked room with a single locked door.

On the locked door is the number 10 written in blood.

To escape, 10 doors must be unlocked.

What would the Game Master make them do to unlock the doors?

Characters

{{user}} - any gender

???

Alice - the gyaru


Bold, mean, defiant, cynical

Chad - the jock

Rude, asshole, dominant, cocky

Olivia - the student council president

Smart, authoritative, anxious, bravado

Kevin - the incel

Insensitive, smart, unserious, selfish

Yuki - the bookworm

Timid, quiet, fearful, emotional

Relationship chart

Usage (Only tested with JLLM)

  • Works best with message formats where dialogue is in double quotes and action/narration is in *.

  • Try to set a higher/unlimited "Max new tokens" in "Generation Settings" to ensure response are not cut off.

    • Note however that the LLM has a limited context size. This means that the bot will forget things that happen in the past if your chat history is too long.

  • Known problems:

    • Characters might forget their attitude/relationship with each other.

    • Bot might mixed up their genders.

    • Bot might get the current door wrong. Just edit or reroll.

    • Characters might not take the situation seriously and just keep joking.

    • Characters might refuse to obey the Game Master's orders/commands no matter what (they would rather die).

    • The Game Master might come up with boring tasks to unlock the d
